case_title: ZEPEDA ESEQUIEL VS ZALAZAR ELISEO ORTEGA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY ZEPEDA ESEQUIEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZALAZAR ELISEO ORTEGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZALAZAR ELISEO ORTEGA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZEPEDA ESEQUIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZALAZAR ELISEO ORTEGA $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,300.00, SUM IS DUE TO PLAINTIFF ON PLAINTIFF'S RETURN DELIVERY OF VAN. FULL JUDGMENT MAY BE SATISFIED IN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
